---
title: "What I'm Doing Now"
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    css: ../talks/talks.css
---

_As of June 8, 2026_

I'm spending my time mostly on:

- 👨‍💼 Working full time as an economist at [GSMA Intelligence](https://www.gsmaintelligence.com/meet-the-team/harry-aquije-ballon), where I study the economic impact of digital technologies and their implications for growth, competition, regulation and public policy.
- 🌍 Living in London.  
- 🏃Running to recharge, refresh and stay fit.  
- 🕺 Making time for salsa whenever I can.
- ✍️ Expanding this website with new articles and research on economic growth, digital technologies, regulation, competition, and AI.
- 🤖 Experimenting with AI agents and developer tools to improve research, coding workflows, and content creation.
- 📚 Current reading list:
  - 🚀 _Beyond Earth: Our Path to a New Home in the Planets_
  - 🤖 _Generative AI with LangChain_
  - 📈 _The AI Economy_
